title.en: Ye Tian and the Lord of Gu Heng both had the Or...

content.en:
Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian and the Lord of Gu Heng both had the Origin Rule on their bodies.

It's just that what appears on Ye Tian's body is the Origin Rule of the Other Shore, while what appears on the Lord of Gu Heng is the ordinary Origin Rule.

Immediately after that, they began to mobilize their origins.

The Lord of Gu Heng was holding an Origin Rule Weapon Long Sword, but Ye Tian didn't take anything.

Ye Tian didn't have an Origin Rule weapon, but he didn't use the Origin Rule weapon to deal with the Lord of Gu Heng.

Tear and pull!

The Lord of Gu Heng held the Origin Rule Weapon Long Sword, which instantly tore through time and space and slashed.

However, Ye Tian smiled slightly, and performed the supreme technique of the other side, and his two fingers instantly crossed time and space, pinching the long sword of the Lord of Gu Heng, directly making the attack of the Lord of Gu Heng invisible.

Immediately afterwards, Ye Tian poked a finger lightly, directly piercing the Origin Realm body of the Lord of Gu Heng, and was immediately hit hard.

Puff puff!!!

The Lord of Gu Heng kept coughing up blood, and the holes in his body were difficult to heal.

"Lord of Gu Heng, now I can prove my strength!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

"You're the supreme !! on the other side"

The Lord of Gu Heng recognized it.

Although he is not a genius at the other side, he also knows the legendary supreme technique of the other side, which is a terrifying skill that surpasses the magic of the other side!

If you want to create the supreme art of the other side, you must master the 109,600 golden scripts and the black scripts of the other side.

So many Golden Texts and Beyond Havens is an astronomical amount for Gu Heng Mountain, and they can't make up so many Beyond Golden Texts and Beyond Haven inheritances, let alone comprehend them all.

And Ye Tian joined Fengya Island for such a short time, not only mastered so many golden texts and black scripts on the other side, but also created the supreme technique on the other side, and also raised his cultivation to the origin realm.

How could it be possible to do it in such a little time?

However, Ye Tian just did it!

......

"Lord of Endless, your strength far surpasses mine!"

The Lord of Gu Heng said with a serious injury, and there was still a little grievance in his tone.

He felt that Ye Tian was so powerful, why didn't he take some hands, he was seriously injured!

He didn't dare to complain, his current strength was far inferior to Ye Tian, but he didn't dare to offend Ye Tian!

The Lord of Eternal Zero was overjoyed, and hurriedly said: "The Lord of Endless now has mastered the supreme technique on the other side, and has mastered the complete golden body on the other side, I am afraid that he is invincible in the Origin Lower Realm, what are the Lord of Ice Glass and the Ice Beast Palace?"

"Guys, I promised to help you, but only this once. "

Ye Tian said.

"Hmm!"

Many of the Origin Realm sub-mountains are the main answers.

The next thing is to plan how to deal with the Ice Beast Palace.

After some discussion, they decided to go out and draw out the Lord of Ice Glass and the other Origin Realms of the Ice Beast Palace, and when the time came, Ye Tian would make another move and kill the Lord of Ice Glass and the other Ice Beast Palace Origin Realms.

......

Green Harvest Treasure Land.

It is also a relatively important treasure of Guheng Mountain, and it is very close to Guheng Mountain.

this day.

The powerhouses of the Ice Beast Palace have descended here to invade this treasure land.

The Lord of Gu Heng and the Lord of Eternal Zero came here directly to protect the Qinghe Treasure Land.

Seeing that the Origin Realm of Gu Heng Mountain finally couldn't help but come out, the Lord of Ice Glass was excited, and without saying a word, he came here with the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the Ice Beast Palace, wanting to besiege and kill the Origin Realm of Gu Heng Mountain.

"Hahaha, Lord of Gu Heng, you all finally appeared!"

The Lord of Ice Glass is very arrogant.

Thundered!!!!

All around, the Origin Realm of the Ice Beast Palace appeared, and many Ice Beasts from the Bone Transformation Realm also came.

"Lord of Ice Glass, do you really want to fight our Gu Heng Mountain to the end?"

The Lord of Gu Heng said coldly.

"Go to war?" the Lord of Ice Glass sneered, "This is called slaughter, are you still qualified to compete with our Ice Beast Palace now?"

Rumble!!!

A set of ice armor appeared on the Lord of Ice Glass, which was a magical skill on the other side - Ice Armor!

Immediately after, countless ice spikes appeared in his hands, covering the surrounding void.

This is the magic of the other side - the thorn of the ice fang, and it is a large-scale attack of the magic power of the other side.

"Go!"

He was too lazy to talk nonsense with these Origin Realms of Gu Heng Mountain.

With his move, combined with his other side origin rules and origin power, it is enough to exert the power of this other side of the supernatural power, not to mention killing the origin realm of Gu Heng Mountain, but killing seven or eight origin realms is not a problem.

"Endless Lord !!"

One of the origins of Gu Heng Mountain shouted.

After all, they can't stop this move, and once they are hit by an ice spike, they can shatter their bodies and make them fall on the spot.

This is the difference between the strength of the other side level genius and the ordinary origin realm, and the gap is too big.

Airplanes!!!!!!

A huge light curtain appeared in front of many ancient Heng Mountain powerhouses, and it was the supreme technique on the other side that protected these Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors after the Golden Cover Technique was enormous.

Bang bang bang!!

These ice spikes struck the golden shield and shattered one after another, and they couldn't shake the golden shield technique at all.

"The supreme technique of the other side!"

The Lord of Ice Glass's face changed drastically.

"May I ask which senior it is, I'll retreat!"

Seeing that the situation was not good, the Lord of Ice Glass prepared to slip away.

Wow!

Ye Tian stopped the Lord of Ice Glass.

"Lord of Ice Glass, you can come if you want, can you leave if you want? You have killed many Heavenly Ancestors of Gu Heng Mountain, so let's stay today!"

Ye Tian said.

"Infinity Lord!"

The Lord of Ice Glass never expected that the person who performed the supreme technique on the other side would be Ye Tian, the genius of the other side who walked out from Gu Heng Mountain and joined Fengya Island.

He had previously ignored the threat of the Infinity Lord, believing that it would be a long time for the Infinity Lord to grow to his level.

As a result, Ye Tian would catch up with him now.

The supreme technique on the other side, this is also the technique he dreams of!

However, he didn't even have the qualifications to create, and he had no hope at all.

But.

Ye Tian's cultivation is not as good as him, he is not without hope of escaping.

Swish!

The Lord of Ice Glass fled as soon as possible, and he didn't even care about the other Origin Realms of the Ice Beast Palace.

However, he still underestimated Ye Tian's strength.

"Endless Golden Arm!"

Ye Tian's arm turned into an endless golden arm, holding an Origin Rule weapon, and killed the Lord of Ice Glass.

The speed of this blow was too fast for the Lord of Ice Glass to think.

And.

Ye Tian also urged the golden body on the other side, which was a complete golden body on the other side.

The cultivation advantage of the Lord of Ice Glass is almost wiped out in front of the complete Golden Body on the other side and the supreme art on the other side.

Rumble!

The Lord of Ice Glass was hit by this blow, and his body was directly cracked, and he was already severely injured.

The first kill came, and he was killed by a single blow before he had time to react to beg for mercy. ~
